title: Pleroma pallidum
taxonomy: Pleroma pallidum is a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphyllaceae. It is native to New Caledonia, a French territory in the Pacific Ocean. The classification of Pleroma pallidum is further defined as being in the genus Pleroma, which consists of various species of flowering plants. Pleroma pallidum is classified as a flowering plant, more specifically a shrub or a small tree. The taxonomy of Pleroma pallidum is subject to ongoing research and refinement in the field of botany.
uses: Pleroma pallidum, a plant species native to Southeast Asia, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
